name: Engine Root
comment: The single entry point. boot.js loads this Thinga and recursively resolves all {ref: '<id>'} children by fetching data/<id>.json (with '/' replaced by '/' in the URL path — IDs ARE paths). Each Thinga referenced is itself a Thinga that may have further children. Infinite recursion is supported by design (a child world can contain another world, a spawn-set's child can be a spawn-set, etc.).
